note: Targets are opaque typed contracts generated from meaning definitions. Search receives no football concept name, definition text, gold chain, provider path, or pattern label.

target_contract.claim_boundary: Observed connected pass-chain sequence only; no planned combination, tactical quality, causation, or optimality claim. Observed identity-return pass chain only; no planned combination, third-man intent, quality, causation, or optimality claim.

composition_constraints.description: The terminal receiver must be the original input passer.
